title: operculina hamiltonii var. hamiltonii
intro: Operculina hamiltonii var. hamiltonii, also known as the lesser calotropis, is a perennial vine native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and anti-cancerous effects. The health benefits of Operculina hamiltonii var. hamiltonii include relief from fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to prevent cancer and reduce blood pressure. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as a decoction, infusion, and tincture, which are used to treat various ailments.
